film.title: Hatyara
film.overview: Daulat Singh and Bhairav Singh are bandits in India and live a violent lifestyle. Daulat is married to Shanta and has two children, Vijay and Geeta. One Diwali he accidentally kills a man, leaving behind a son and his mother almost destitute. Moved by their plight, he surrenders to the Police, is arrested, tried in Court, and sentenced to life in prison.

dialogues.dialogue: Really! - Look! Where to? In your eyes or your heart. - Shut up. Shameless! What if the Goddess hears it? So what? - Kid, I'm hearing it all! Wait! Let me go and meet the Goddess. - Okay.

And will they forget that you were famous with the name of Daulat Singh. Did you forget? Shameless! There's a very rare chance that a son would.."Address the murderer of his son as a noble man! Why don't you admit that his daughter has cast a spell on you?

Son, now that you have tied these bullets to you. Where should I hide my prestige now? Speak up. The turban that made me feel so proud, while getting it tied. Father, it no longer is a respect but a disgrace. Throw it away.
